name: bug
description: Something isn't working as expected or crashes

name: enhancement
description: New feature, capability, or CLI request

name: documentation
description: Improvements or additions to documentation and help text

name: good first issue
description: Good for newcomers diving into the WindMist codebase

name: help wanted
description: Extra attention or community assistance is requested

name: question
description: Further information is requested or general inquiry

name: performance
description: Optimizing execution speed, memory footprint, or token latency

name: security
description: Security vulnerability, secret handling, or safety check

name: provider
description: Relates to AI model providers (Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama)

name: tooling
description: Relates to CLI flags, Glamour/Lip Gloss TUI, or build tools

name: testing
description: Adding or improving unit tests, golden tests, or CI checks

name: refactor
description: Code cleanup or architectural restructuring without changing behavior

name: dependencies
description: Pull requests that update go.mod packages or external dependencies
